overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort MSCI EAFE (EFU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE index. The fund provides geared inverse (-2x) exposure to a market-cap-weighted index representing 85% of the market capitalization of each industry group in developed markets ex-North America. EFU was launched on Oct 23, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
